text.tspan: Each dot is one month. In recent years, pump prices have surged with crude oil spikes but appear to have
become stickier on the way down — a pattern less visible before 2021.

text.tspan: Singapore pump prices are monthly averages across Shell, Caltex and SPC (Esso and Sinopec included where available). Brent crude
